analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒較為複雜，道瓊未來指數下跌，但Meta的股價大幅上漲，影響了SpaceX、Micron和許多AI股。特斯拉即將達到買點，而6月就業報告也即將公佈。另外，Vanguard的科技ETF被指出有高達數萬美元的重疊成本。亞馬遜加大對企業人工智慧的投資，與Palantir的前沿部署工程師模式有所不同。General Mills的股價今日大漲，試圖對抗通膨。三星電子和SK Hynix的股價暴跌超過7%，因為晶片市場的下挫。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜，避免被市場情緒左右。應該考慮孩子的投資組合，避免將全部資產投資在美股上。投資者也應該注意公司的財務表現和未來前景，避免投資於高估值的公司。

【精選個股】
AMD - AMD：EPYC，非Instinct，領導AI成長 - 持有：AMD最新發表指出，EPYC系列處理器在AI領域的成長率遠超Instinct GPU，投資者建議持續持有AMD股票。
Nvidia - Nvidia投入人工智慧機器人市場，預計達到千億美元的市場規模：Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang認為人工智慧機器人是一個「數兆美元的經濟機會」，公司正積極投資於此領域。
Sprout Social - Sprout Social：不夠說服力的高檔推廣（評級下調）：Sprout Social 的高檔推廣策略未能獲得投資者的信任，導致評級下調。該公司的財務表現未能符合市場預期，投資者對其未來前景感到憂慮。

風險提醒：投資者應該注意公司的財務表現和未來前景，避免投資於高估值的公司。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Meta Jumps But Hits SpaceX, Micron; Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
items.summary: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數：Meta大躍進但打擊SpaceX、Micron；特斯拉、就業報告即將來臨
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數今日下跌，Meta的股價大幅上漲，但影響了SpaceX、Micron和許多AI股。特斯拉即將達到買點，而6月就業報告也即將公佈。

items.title: VGT’s 0.09% Fee Hides a Bigger Problem: Overlap Costs That Could Add Up to Tens of Thousands
items.summary: Vanguard’s tech ETF sells itself on cost. At 0.09%, Vanguard Information Technology Index Fund ETF (NYSEARCA:VGT) sits near the floor of sector ETF pricing. That headline number is real. It is also the least interesting cost in the fund. What You Are Actually Paying The sticker fee reflects the fund’s 0.09% net expense ratio disclosed ... VGT’s 0.09% Fee Hides a Bigger Problem: Overlap Costs That Could Add Up to Tens of Thousands
items.zh_title: VGT的 0.09% 費用隱藏著更大的問題：重疊成本可能高達數萬美元
items.zh_point: Vanguard 的科技 ETF 以低費用為賣點，但其實 0.09% 的費率只是表面上的低成本，實際上還有更高的重疊成本可能高達數萬美元。

items.title: Amazon doubles down on enterprise AI bet
items.summary: Palantir invented the forward-deployed engineer model more than a decade ago. The firm's engineers became known for living inside government agencies and Fortune 500 companies for months at a time, not to train employees on software, but to build systems alongside them from the inside. On June 30, ...
items.zh_title: 亞馬遜加大企業人工智慧投資
items.zh_point: 亞馬遜正加大對企業人工智慧的投資，與 Palantir 的前沿部署工程師模式有所不同，亞馬遜的工程師不僅僅是為員工提供軟體訓練，而是與企業內部一起建造系統。

items.title: Why General Mills Stock Jumped Today
items.summary: The packaged goods giant is slashing costs as it battles inflation.
items.zh_title: General Mills 股票今日大漲
items.zh_point: General Mills 這家包裝食品巨頭正試圖對抗通膨，通過削減成本來鞏固財務。

items.title: This Palantir Rival Could Soar 36% in a Year, According to Wall Street. Is It a Buy Right Now?
items.summary: Analysts expect BigBear.ai to emerge from its slump and deliver solid gains over the coming year.
items.zh_title: 這家Palantir競爭對手今年可能漲幅達36%，華爾街是否認為現在買入？
items.zh_point: 分析師預測BigBear.ai將從低迷中恢復，今年將取得穩定的收益。

items.title: Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix shares tumble over 7% as chip rout spreads from Wall Street
items.summary: Shares of Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix plummeted more than 7% in early Thursday trading.
items.zh_title: 三星電子、SK Hynix 股價暴跌超過 7% 因晶片市場大幅下挫
items.zh_point: 三星電子和SK Hynix的股價在週四早盤大幅下挫，超過 7%，因為晶片市場的下挫從華爾街蔓延開來。

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.zh_title: 阿里巴巴附屬企業安踏急速進入人工智慧機器人領域
items.zh_point: 安踏在18個月內與人工智慧機器人公司簽下十餘筆合約，並在人工智慧機器人公司Zeroth中投資500萬元人民幣（約7,359萬美元），以推動人工智慧機器人領域的發展。

items.title: Oil prices fall after U.S.-Iran talks conclude in Doha
items.summary: Oil prices fell more than 1% on Wednesday after talks between Washington and Tehran concluded.
items.zh_title: 美國與伊朗會談結束後油價下跌
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗的會談在多哈結束後，油價下跌超過1%，成為本周內油價下跌的又一例子。

items.title: Inside India newsletter: Amazon, Walmart-owned Flipkart get ready to shake upIndia's delivery-in-minutes sector
items.summary: Amazon and Walmart-owned Flipkart are scrambling to expand quick commerce operations in India, not just to chase growth but to remain relevant to consumers.
items.zh_title: 亞馬遜和Flipkart準備搶佔印度即時送貨市場
items.zh_point: 亞馬遜和Flipkart正加速在印度推動即時送貨業務，既要追求成長，也要保持與消費者相關性。

items.title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
items.summary: The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies, in a new report.
items.zh_title: 韓國政府歧視Coupang和美國公司，美國眾議院報告發現
items.zh_point: 美國眾議院司法委員會發表報告指出，韓國政府對Coupang和其他美國公司採取歧視性措施。

items.title: Protein-packed Cheerios and cat food: How General Mills plans to combat a tough spending backdrop
items.summary: “Cat growth is on fire,” one executive said.
items.zh_title: 高蛋白 Cheerios 和貓糧：General Mills 如何應對嚴峻的消費情況
items.zh_point: General Mills 面臨嚴峻的消費環境，公司計劃通過推出高蛋白的 Cheerios 和貓糧等產品來應對挑戰。

items.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
items.summary: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.
items.zh_title: 為孩子開「川普戶口」？你需要先面對的風險
items.zh_point: 為了避免風險，父母應該考慮孩子的投資組合，避免將全部資產投資在美股上。

items.title: Nvidia is betting on a trillion-dollar robotics boom. Here is the hidden way to trade it.
items.summary: CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots a “multitrillion-dollar economic opportunity.”
items.zh_title: Nvidia投入人工智慧機器人市場，預計達到千億美元的市場規模
items.zh_point: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang認為人工智慧機器人是一個「數兆美元的經濟機會」，公司正積極投資於此領域。

items.title: ‘We were stunned’: My daughter, 39, said her mother-in-law gives her more money than we do. Do I call her out?
items.summary: “She thanked us for the $100 birthday gift and then announced that her mother-in-law had sent her $400.”
items.zh_title: 我女兒說婆婆給她更多錢，我該怎麼做？
items.zh_point: 一位父親在女兒的生日聚會上發現，女兒的婆婆給了她更多的生日禮物，讓他感到困惑，該如何處理這種情況？

items.title: CoreWeave, Nebius shares tumble as Meta stands to become a fresh threat in the cloud
items.summary: Meta’s reported interest in monetizing its AI infrastructure is leading investors to question the sustainability of neocloud business models.
items.zh_title: CoreWeave、Nebius股價大跌　Meta將成為雲端新威脅
items.zh_point: Meta宣布利用其人工智慧基礎設施盈利的計畫，引發投資者對新雲端商業模式可持續性的質疑。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市整體下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所金價下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，連續兩天金價下跌，三天內銀價下跌三次。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，未使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找未必會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業回顧：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊產業的最新發展，包括市場趨勢和投資機會。

items.title: AMD: EPYC, Not Instinct, Is Leading AI Growth - Hold
items.zh_title: AMD：EPYC，非Instinct，領導AI成長 - 持有
items.zh_point: AMD最新發表指出，EPYC系列處理器在AI領域的成長率遠超Instinct GPU，投資者建議持續持有AMD股票。

items.title: Sprout Social: Unconvincing Upmarket Push (Rating Downgrade)
items.zh_title: Sprout Social：不夠說服力的高檔推廣（評級下調）
items.zh_point: Sprout Social 的高檔推廣策略未能獲得投資者的信任，導致評級下調。該公司的財務表現未能符合市場預期，投資者對其未來前景感到憂慮。

items.title: Texas Instruments: Rich Valuation, Muted Upside - A Hold For Now
items.zh_title: 德州儀器：高估值、消極上升趨勢 - 暫時持有
items.zh_point: 德州儀器的股價因高估值而受到質疑，短期內上升趨勢可能不大，投資者暫時應該持有觀望。

items.title: Job Openings Rising
items.zh_title: 求職機會增多
items.zh_point: 美國的就業市場正在出現改善的跡象，求職機會增加，可能是經濟復甦的前奏。

items.title: ADP National Employment Report: 98K Private Jobs Added In June
items.zh_title: ADP 國家就業報告：6月私營就業人數增加98,000人
items.zh_point: 美國私營企業在6月份創造了98萬個新工作機會，表明美國就業市場正在持續擴張，但具體數據仍需要等待官方公布的就業數據來確認。

items.title: CapsoVision director Joanne Imperial sells $8,586 in common stock
items.zh_title: CapsoVision 董事 Joanne Imperial 賣出 8586 美元普通股
items.zh_point: CapsoVision 董事 Joanne Imperial 賣出了價值 8586 美元的普通股，可能是為了籌措資金或調整投資組合。

items.title: Form 4 Mdu Res Group Inc For: 1 July
items.zh_title: Mdu Res Group Inc 7月1日 Form 4
items.zh_point: Mdu Res Group Inc 發布了 7 月 1 日的 Form 4 報告，內容可能與公司管理層股權變動有關。

items.title: Form 4 CapsoVision Inc For: 1 July
items.zh_title: CapsoVision Inc 2024 年 7 月 1 日 Form 4
items.zh_point: CapsoVision Inc 的高管人員於 2024 年 7 月 1 日進行了股份交易，相關細節待查詢。

items.title: Form 4 Mdu Res Group Inc For: 1 July
items.zh_title: Mdu Res Group Inc Form 4 1 July
items.zh_point: Mdu Res Group Inc 公布了 1 月 1 日的 Form 4 報告，內容未透露。

items.title: Form 13D/A Gossamer Bio For: 1 July
items.zh_title: Gossamer Bio Form 13D/A 報告：2024 年 7 月 1 日
items.zh_point: Gossamer Bio 公布了 Form 13D/A 報告，可能與公司股權變動或投資者持股比例變化有關。
